roa.docketEntryComment: PD MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE FILED

/CAL:TO SET SENTENCING/X:THE DEFENDANT HAS A FAVORABLE 'FRIENDSHIP HOUSE'PROGRAM/X:THE DEFENDANT WITHDRAWS HIS GUILTY PLEA AS TO COUNT 1/MO PC 17B/MO GRTD/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PER WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV RTS:1/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PPRF/REMA/ARBUCKLE/TWS/CONTD:TO SET SENTENCING/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND MOTION TO MODIFY TERMS OF RELEASE/MO GRTD//CTORD:THAT THE ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:DEFENSE ORAL REQUEST TO REMOVE ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE IS ORDERED TO BE SUBMITTED AS A FILED MOTION/  /X:DEPT, 20CASE/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE & MOT TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DOP/X:THE COURT WILL ALLOW THE DEFENDANT TO VISIT FAMILY ON WEEKENDS, EVEN THOUGH HE IS AFFIXED WITH AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE/

/CAL:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:THE COURT IS INFORMED THAT A RESIDENTIAL BEDIS AVAILABLE TODAY FOR DEFENDANT AT FRIENDSHIP HOUSE,/ACM/STWPX/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONICMONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/CTORD:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO REMAIN IN THE FRIENDSHIP HOUSE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENTPROGRAM FOR THE DURATION OF HIS COURSE OF TREATMENT, SHOULD DEFENDANT LEAVEFRIENDSHIP HOUSE WITHOUT TH4E AUTHORITY OF THE COURT, HE WILL BE ARRRESTEDAND RETURNED TO CUSTODY,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:STATUS OF PROGRAM/DOPU:IN PROGRAM/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED BY DA/X: ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL SIGNED AND FILED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 11-06-18/987,2/BAIL:150000/SA1: PHILLIP DAVID CHARRETTE ANDLAUDENIA RENEE ZUNIGA/SA2: JACK IN THE BOX AT 2739 TAYLOR ST SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/DOP/
/CAL:STATUS OF RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/X:PROOF OF ENROLLMENT HAS BEEN PROVIDED TO THE COURT/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND DEFENSE MOTION FOR RELEASE FROM CUSTODY/CONTD:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/LD:12-24-18/
